_meta.description: Empirical zone% and K%-bias data for MLB home-plate umpires. kRateAdj is the umpire's strikeout-rate delta vs league average in percentage points (positive = expanded zone, more Ks; negative = tight zone, fewer Ks). zonePct is strike-zone size relative to league average (1.0 = average). Source: Baseball Savant umpire scorecards and Statcast zone data (365-day rolling window). Stub data for v6.12.0 — values should be refreshed from live Savant data each season.

fields.name: Full name as returned by MLB Stats API
fields.zonePct: Called-strike zone size relative to league average (1.0 = league avg, >1.0 = expanded zone)
fields.kRateAdj: Strikeout-rate adjustment in pp vs league average (+pp = more Ks, -pp = fewer Ks)
fields.bbRateAdj: Walk-rate adjustment in pp vs league average (+pp = more BBs, -pp = fewer BBs)
